journeys.description: A model answers in chat without creating an artifact or effect.
The model authors code and presents the artifact on canvas.
An MCP read completes and remains an activity row.
An MCP read creates a generic table surface.
A CSV is promoted to an internal artifact, edited, and staged to a workspace.
A workspace effect is approved, claimed, and applied.
A workspace commit detects precondition drift and does not mutate the host.
An MCP write is staged, revised, approved, claimed, and applied.
A worker crashes after claiming an effect and reconciliation proves it applied.
A workspace grant gate parks and then resumes an operation.
A child operation authored by a subagent creates an artifact with parent attribution.
A destructive effect stays staged even when the connector posture is allow_always.
A browser form submission is staged and explicitly cancelled.
